criteria.name: Schema Conformance
criteria.1: Appended entry is missing required fields, uses wrong field names, or uses field order inconsistent with decision-log-format.md; entry cannot be parsed downstream.
criteria.3: All required fields present and named correctly, minor formatting drift (extra whitespace, smart quotes, slightly off indent) but entry is parseable.
criteria.5: Entry matches resources/template.md byte-for-byte in structure: correct header line, exact bullet keys, right indentation for variants block, separator line after entry; downstream parsers can reliably extract every field.

criteria.name: Decision ID Assignment
criteria.1: decision_id reused, wrong format, or inconsistent with existing log entries; same-day same-type collision not detected.
criteria.3: decision_id follows the {YYYY-MM-DD}-{decision_type}-{NN} format and is unique, but NN not strictly sequential or zero-padding inconsistent.
criteria.5: decision_id is deterministic, zero-padded to 2 digits, strictly next sequential NN for that day+type, derived from a tail re-read immediately before writing, and collision-safe under parallel agent invocations.

criteria.name: Append-Only Integrity
criteria.1: Skill rewrites, reorders, or deletes existing entries; modifies fields other than the three outcome fields; truncates the log on error.
criteria.3: Append and calibration edits are correct in the happy path but leave occasional whitespace or trailing separator anomalies; existing content preserved but reformatting risk present.
criteria.5: Append writes are strictly additive (new block + separator), calibration edits touch only the three outcome lines, every other byte in the file is preserved, and a byte-level diff of non-target content is empty.

criteria.name: Validation Rigor
criteria.1: Malformed payloads are written without checks; enum violations, out-of-range confidence, missing variants, or unverifiable will_verify_on pass through.
criteria.3: Most required fields validated; some edge cases (e.g., 'end of week N' parsing, action-verb detection on the recommendation) pass without strict checking.
criteria.5: Every validation rule in methodology.md enforced: timestamp format, decision_type enum, emitted_by whitelist, action-verb prefix on recommendation, signals_in non-empty with named signal, both variants present, confidence in [0,1], will_verify_on parseable, calibrate-mode enums. Failures return structured error with field+reason and no partial write.

criteria.name: Calibration Accuracy
criteria.1: Calibration edits wrong entry, overwrites already-calibrated entry, touches non-outcome fields, or silently no-ops on missing decision_id.
criteria.3: Calibration locates the right entry and fills outcome fields but occasionally rewrites surrounding whitespace or double-counts on retry.
criteria.5: Calibration is idempotent: detects already-populated outcome_recorded_on and returns without re-applying; surgical line replacement with no side effects; triggers calibration-review.md entry when high-confidence decision was wrong; returns both decision_id and scoreboard-row-updated confirmation.

criteria.name: Concurrency Handling
criteria.1: No re-read before write; parallel agents produce duplicate decision_ids or interleaved garbled entries; race conditions corrupt the log.
criteria.3: Re-reads log tail before each write so sequential agent calls in one run get unique ids; no explicit collision detection after the write.
criteria.5: Re-reads tail immediately before every write (no cached state from earlier in the run), assigns decision_id from the just-read state, re-reads last 20 lines after write to confirm no id collision, and auto-bumps NN on the rare collision without corrupting the file.

criteria.name: Scoreboard Update Correctness
criteria.1: Scoreboard row for wrong agent updated, counts incremented incorrectly, 'both' / 'neither' not handled, or table structure damaged.
criteria.3: Correct row found and Total/Advocate/Critic counts incremented, but Synthesis correct not handled for 'partial' outcomes, or other non-table text slightly disturbed.
criteria.5: Increments exactly the right row: Total +1, Advocate +1 on {advocate, both}, Critic +1 on {critic, both}, Synthesis correct uses +1/+0/+0.5 for happened/did-not-happen/partial, idempotent on retries (skip if entry already calibrated), scoreboard non-table text unchanged.

criteria.name: Tilt Recomputation
criteria.1: Tilt reported with <10 verified decisions, thresholds applied incorrectly, or uses full history instead of the recent window.
criteria.3: Tilt computed over recent window with 10+ decisions threshold, but thresholds slightly off (e.g., at 15 instead of 10/20 pct points) or 'both' not credited to both variants in the window.
criteria.5: Tilt uses the most recent 20 verified decisions per agent, reports 'neutral' below N=10, applies the exact 10/20 pct-point thresholds, credits 'both' to both variants and 'neither' to neither, and is re-run on every calibration so the coach always sees current tilt.

key_requirements: Schema Conformance, Decision ID Assignment, Validation Rigor, Append-Only Integrity, and Concurrency Handling are the load-bearing criteria.
Calibration Accuracy, Scoreboard Update, and Tilt Recomputation are not exercised in append mode and are scored N/A (exclude from average).
common_pitfalls: Caching the log tail from an earlier skill invocation in the same run -> duplicate decision_ids under parallel agents.
Auto-fixing a missing field instead of rejecting -> corrupts downstream calibration.
Writing when the action verb does not match the vocabulary (e.g., 'Consider Caminero') -> breaks the action-ladder rule from CLAUDE.md.

key_requirements: Calibration Accuracy, Scoreboard Update Correctness, and Tilt Recomputation are the load-bearing criteria.
Append-Only Integrity still applies: only three lines in the target entry may change.
Validation Rigor applies to the calibrate payload (outcome and variant_that_was_right enums).
common_pitfalls: Editing the full entry block to 'reformat' -> silently modifies recommendation or variants text.
Double-counting when the calibration call is retried because outcome_recorded_on idempotency check is missing.
Computing Tilt off full history instead of the recent-20 window -> stale bias hints for the coach.

common_failure_modes.failure: Duplicate decision_id under parallel agent calls
common_failure_modes.symptom: Two entries in the log share the same decision_id (e.g., two 2026-04-17-lineup-01).
common_failure_modes.detection: After writing, re-read the last 20 lines and scan for a repeated id.
common_failure_modes.fix: Bump NN on the later entry, rewrite only that id line in place. Add this check as a permanent post-write step.

common_failure_modes.symptom: Byte diff on calibration shows changes to recommendation, variants, or confidence lines.
common_failure_modes.detection: Compare pre- and post-calibration entry; only the three outcome lines should differ.
common_failure_modes.fix: Locate target lines within the entry block by exact substring match; replace just those lines; never round-trip the full block through a reformatter.

common_failure_modes.symptom: Total decisions increments twice for one decision_id after a retried calibration call.
common_failure_modes.detection: Before incrementing, check whether outcome_recorded_on is already populated in the log entry.
common_failure_modes.fix: Early-exit the scoreboard update when the entry is already calibrated; return a 'no-op, already calibrated' status.

common_failure_modes.symptom: Entries appear with confidence=1.5, unknown decision_type, or missing variants.
common_failure_modes.detection: Parse every appended entry against the schema immediately after writing.
common_failure_modes.fix: Validate payload before the write, not after. Reject with structured error and never attempt auto-repair.

common_failure_modes.detection: Verify the recent-window count is >=10 before emitting any non-neutral tilt.
common_failure_modes.fix: Gate tilt computation on N>=10; below that, hard-code 'neutral'.

common_failure_modes.symptom: Two consecutive append calls in the same coach run produce the same NN.
common_failure_modes.detection: Add logging of the tail-read bytes per invocation; compare.
common_failure_modes.fix: Always re-read the log tail inside the skill invocation, not once at coach startup. Treat each invocation as stateless.

common_failure_modes.failure: Calibration review not triggered on high-confidence miss
common_failure_modes.symptom: Agent consistently misses calls at confidence >= 0.80 with no entries in tracker/calibration-review.md.
common_failure_modes.detection: After each calibration, check the rule: if confidence >= 0.80 AND variant_that_was_right != advocate (for an advocate-wins synthesis) OR outcome == 'did not happen', log a lesson.
common_failure_modes.fix: Make the calibration-review write a mandatory step in calibration mode, not optional.

common_failure_modes.failure: Agent writes to log directly (bypassing the skill)
common_failure_modes.symptom: Entries appear in decisions-log.md without going through this skill's validator, often missing separator or malformed.
common_failure_modes.detection: Log entries failing schema check on the next read pass.
common_failure_modes.fix: Coach rule: no agent has write permission on decisions-log.md. Document in CLAUDE.md and enforce in agent system prompts. Log any bypass instance in calibration-review.md.
